articles.title: Tesla Sold 75% of Its Bitcoin in the Last Quarter
articles.description: Tesla now holds only $218 million worth of Bitcoin, down from more than $1.2 billion. Tesla has sold most of its Bitcoin.In its latest quarterly report published late Wednesday, the electric car giant revealed that it had converted approximately 75% of its Bitcoin holdings into fiat currency. As of June 30, the firm held only $218 million in digital assets, down from more than $1.2 billion in...
